center.title: Interviews
center.startNewInterviewHint:
Choose a role and resume
then start practice
center.listSummary: {total} records · Free plan has {limit} per month; used {used}/{limit}
center.upgradeDescription: Unlimited resume versions, JD matching, and dedicated interview practice.
center.practiceSubheading: Based on your resume and target role, AI simulates a real interview so you can practice ahead of time.
center.needResumePrefix: Mock interviews need a resume first. Go to
center.needResumeSuffix: to finish that step, then come back to practice.
center.targetPracticeDescription: Enter a target JD and AI will generate focused interview questions for that role.
center.practiceTipFeedback: After each interview, AI gives detailed answer feedback and improvement suggestions.
center.practiceTipReview: Interview history is saved in Interview review and can be revisited anytime.
center.practiceTipQuota: Free users can run 3 complete mock interviews per month; Pro has unlimited practice.
center.emptyDescription: Choose a resume and start practicing for a target role.
center.emptyNoResumeDescription: Mock interviews need your resume and target role context. Upload or create a resume, then come back to start practicing.
center.emptyUploadDescription: Supports PDF / Word / TXT and parses it into a structured resume.
center.emptyCreateDescription: Start from a structured template when you do not have a resume yet.
center.hintRoleDescription: Questions are based on the resume and JD, not a generic question bank.
center.hintRecordDescription: Review the conversation, follow-ups, and performance summary after the session.
center.hintImproveDescription: Turn weak answers into concrete practice points for the next round.
center.readResumeError: Failed to read saved role context. Fill it manually.
center.createError: Failed to create interview. Please try again.
center.deleteConfirm: Delete this interview record? This cannot be undone.

errors.sessionMismatch: Interview record does not match this resume
errors.reportSkipped: This interview has no answers to review yet. Complete one Q&A before generating a report.

form.jdPlaceholder: Paste a JD, or save one on the resume edit page first

session.transcriptEmpty: No interview transcript is available yet.
session.title: Mock interview
